title: ED capacity discussion documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

assessment.text: Supports a time- and decision-specific capacity assessment, presumption of capacity, practical support, and recording the assessment; UK legal rules require UAE adaptation.
assessment.rationale: The exact GMC capacity section supports documenting the patient concerns or goals, decision-specific risk context and a focused capacity assessment only when undertaken; UK law is not treated as UAE authority.
assessment.evidence_extract: Supports a time- and decision-specific capacity assessment, presumption of capacity, practical support, and recording the assessment; UK legal rules require UAE adaptation.

exact_section.heading: Paragraphs 76–86 — If a patient may lack capacity

treatment_and_management.text: Supports recording the exchange of information leading to a decision, the decision and action agreed, who made or agreed it, and a decision to take no action.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The exact recording section supports documenting the clinician-entered decision or plan, completed risk or consent discussion and any agreed handover or follow-up; it does not decide capacity.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports recording the exchange of information leading to a decision, the decision and action agreed, who made or agreed it, and a decision to take no action.

sources_used.title: Decision making and consent
sources_used.jurisdiction: United Kingdom professional standards; UAE consent and capacity law governs local use

additions.text: Supports a time- and decision-specific capacity assessment, presumption of capacity, practical support, and recording the assessment; UK legal rules require UAE adaptation.
additions.rationale: The exact GMC capacity section supports documenting the patient concerns or goals, decision-specific risk context and a focused capacity assessment only when undertaken; UK law is not treated as UAE authority.
additions.evidence_extract: Supports a time- and decision-specific capacity assessment, presumption of capacity, practical support, and recording the assessment; UK legal rules require UAE adaptation.

source_limitations: The exact decision, information given, options, communication support, capacity elements, legal authority, surrogate involvement, best-interest process, refusal, emergency exception and final action remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
